settings.title: Privacy Policy
settings.body:
Introduction

At A Charkha Story ("we", "us", "our"), we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding it.

Information We Collect

When You Shop

  • Name, email address, and phone number
  • Shipping and billing address
  • Payment information (processed securely via Razorpay — we never store card details)
  • Order history and preferences

When You Browse

  • IP address and browser type
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Device information
  • Cookies for site functionality and analytics

How We Use Your Data

  • To process and deliver your orders
  • To send order updates via email and WhatsApp
  • To improve our products and website experience
  • To send promotional emails (only with your consent)
  • To respond to your queries and support requests

Data Sharing

We never sell your personal data. We share information only with:

  • Shipping partners — to deliver your orders
  • Payment processors — to securely process payments (Razorpay)
  • Analytics tools — to understand website usage (Google Analytics)

Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Access the personal data we hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate data
  • Request deletion of your data
  • Opt out of marketing communications at any time

Cookies

We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytical cookies to understand how visitors use our site. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including SSL encryption, secure payment processing, and restricted access controls.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by the "Last updated" date at the top of this page.
